title: Phosphorus Extraction - Olsen Method
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"eof5f","text":"The method is based on the extraction of phosphate from the soil by 0.5 N sodium bicarbonate solution adjusted to pH 8.5.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"2u2on","text":"50 ml polypropylene centrifuge tube for extraction (3 per site and depth)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f3nf3","text":"50 ml polypropylene centrifuge tube for extractant (3 per site and depth)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9rn37","text":"~12 g of fresh soil","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1uia5","text":"Olsen extract solution (See OSU Soil health lab protocol for making extraction solution)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5hiat","text":"25 ml pipet","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"barkh","text":"Electronic pipettor","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"epje9","text":"Centrifuge","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7110n","text":"Shaker","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Print the required labels needed for Bray extraction for each site, depth, and replicate.
Weigh out 3 g of soil into labeled 50 mL centrifuge tubes.
Add 20 mL of Olsen Extract solution (in cabinet under hood in 1521) using the pipet and electronic pipettor.
Cap the samples and shake to mix. Add samples to foam block on shaker.
Centrifuge samples (using centrifuge on west side of 1521) for 4000 rpm, , 8 minutes .
Pour off liquid into a clean and labelled 50 mL centrifuge tube.
Freeze samples on their side to prevent tube breaking in the -20 °C freezer (Staging Freezer 2) bottom shelf if unable to filter immediately.
Follow sample filtering protocol below when ready to filter extracts.
creator: nicholas.sconzo
